examples: Her words set off a chain reaction.
She set off on her journey yesterday.
They set off for the mountains.
The smoke set off the alarm.
The spark set off the explosion.
He set off without saying goodbye.
We set off early in the morning.
What time did you set off?
The news set off panic among investors.
The comment set off an argument.
example_translate: Она отправилась в своё путешествие вчера.
Мы отправились в путь рано утром.
set off.synonyms:
Отправляться в путь - depart, leave, set out
Вызывать, провоцировать (реакцию) - trigger, cause, provoke
